items.question_zh: 结构、schema、链接和节点长度检查是否通过？
items.question_en: Did structure, schema, links, and node-budget checks pass?

items.question_zh: 最近失败样例和核心回归套件是否通过？
items.question_en: Did recent failure cases and the core regression suite pass?

items.question_zh: 是否完成 with/without 或 old/new 配对评估？
items.question_en: Was with/without or old/new paired evaluation completed?

items.question_zh: 触发准确率和误触发率是否达到阈值？
items.question_en: Did activation precision and false-trigger rate meet thresholds?

items.question_zh: 上下文、token、工具调用和运行时间是否在预算内？
items.question_en: Are context, token, tool-call, and runtime costs within budget?

items.question_zh: 权限、路径、网络和人工确认边界是否验证？
items.question_en: Were permission, path, network, and human-gate boundaries verified?

items.question_zh: 是否有回滚、下线或禁用策略？
items.question_en: Is there a rollback, deprecation, or disable strategy?

items.question_zh: 是否存在发布清单，记录版本、变更类型、兼容性、测试证据和回滚入口？
items.question_en: Is there a release manifest recording version, change type, compatibility, test evidence, and rollback entrypoint?

items.question_zh: 运行时是否能记录 skill_id、skill_version、trace_id、tool_calls、loaded_doc_ids 和指标？
items.question_en: Can runtime logs capture skill_id, skill_version, trace_id, tool_calls, loaded_doc_ids, and metrics?

items.question_zh: 破坏性变更是否提供弃用元数据、替代 skill 和迁移窗口？
items.question_en: Do breaking changes provide deprecation metadata, replacement skill, and migration window?
